verses.translation: For the mind is restless, turbulent, obstinate and very strong, O Krsna, and to subdue it is, it seems to me, more difficult than controlling the wind.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: O mighty-armed son of Kunti, it is undoubtedly very difficult to curb the restless mind, but it is possible by constant practice and by detachment.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: For one whose mind is unbridled, self-realization is difficult work. But he whose mind is controlled and who strives by right means is assured of success. That is My opinion.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: Arjuna said: What is the destination of the man of faith who does not persevere, who in the beginning takes to the process of self-realization but who later desists due to worldly-mindedness and thus does not attain perfection in mysticism?
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: O mighty-armed Krsna, does not such a man, being deviated from the path of Transcendence, perish like a riven cloud, with no position in any sphere?
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: This is my doubt O Krsna, and I ask You to dispel it completely. But for Yourself, no one is to be found who can destroy this doubt.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: Son of Prtha, a transcendentalist engaged in auspicious activities does not meet with destruction either in this world or in the spiritual world; one who does good, My friend, is never overcome by evil.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: The unsuccessful yogi, after many, many years of enjoyment on the planets of the pious living entities, is born into a family of righteous people, or into a family of rich aristocracy.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: Or he takes his birth in a family of transcendentalists who are surely great in wisdom. Verily, such a birth is rare in this world.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: On taking such a birth, he again revives the divine consciousness of his previous life, and he tries to make further progress in order to achieve complete success, O son of Kuru.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: By virtue of the divine consciousness of his previous life, he automatically becomes attracted to the yogic principles—even without seeking them. Such an inquisitive transcendentalist, striving for yoga, stands always above the ritualistic principles of the scriptures.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: But when the yogi engages himself with sincere endeavor in making further progress, being washed of all contaminations, then ultimately, after many, many births of practice, he attains the supreme goal.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: A yogi is greater than the ascetic, greater than the empiricist and greater than the fruitive worker. Therefore, O Arjuna, in all circumstances, be a yogi.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

verses.translation: And of all yogis, he who always abides in Me with great faith, worshiping Me in transcendental loving service, is most intimately united with Me in yoga and is the highest of all.
verses.topics: sankhya-yoga meditation dhyana mind control yoga self-realization solitude

chapters.name: Knowledge of the Absolute
chapters.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Now hear, O son of Prtha [Arjuna], how by practicing yoga in full consciousness of Me, with mind attached to Me, you can know Me in full, free from doubt.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: I shall now declare unto you in full this knowledge both phenomenal and noumenal, by knowing which there shall remain nothing further to be known.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Out of many thousands among men, one may endeavor for perfection, and of those who have achieved perfection, hardly one knows Me in truth.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Earth, water, fire, air, ether, mind, intelligence and false ego—altogether these eight comprise My separated material energies.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Besides this inferior nature, O mighty-armed Arjuna, there is a superior energy of Mine, which are all living entities who are struggling with material nature and are sustaining the universe.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Of all that is material and all that is spiritual in this world, know for certain that I am both its origin and dissolution.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: O conquerer of wealth [Arjuna], there is no Truth superior to Me. Everything rests upon Me, as pearls are strung on a thread.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: O son of Kunti [Arjuna], I am the taste of water, the light of the sun and the moon, the syllable om in the Vedic mantras; I am the sound in ether and ability in man.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: I am the original fragrance of the earth, and I am the heat in fire. I am the life of all that lives, and I am the penances of all ascetics.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: O son of Prtha, know that I am the original seed of all existences, the intelligence of the intelligent, and the prowess of all powerful men.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: I am the strength of the strong, devoid of passion and desire. I am sex life which is not contrary to religious principles, O Lord of the Bharatas [Arjuna].
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: All states of being—be they of goodness, passion or ignorance—are manifested by My energy. I am, in one sense, everything—but I am independant. I am not under the modes of this material nature.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Deluded by the three modes [goodness, passion and ignorance], the whole world does not know Me who am above the modes and inexhaustible.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: This divine energy of Mine, consisting of the three modes of material nature, is difficult to overcome. But those who have surrendered unto Me can easily cross beyond it.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Those miscreants who are grossly foolish, lowest among mankind, whose knowledge is stolen by illusion, and who partake of the atheistic nature of demons, do not surrender unto Me.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: O best among the Bharatas [Arjuna], four kinds of pious men render devotional service unto Me—the distressed, the desirer of wealth, the inquisitive, and he who is searching for knowledge of the Absolute.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Of these, the wise one who is in full knowledge in union with Me through pure devotional service is the best. For I am very dear to him, and he is dear to Me.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: All these devotees are undoubtedly magnanimous souls, but he who is situated in knowledge of Me I consider verily to dwell in Me. Being engaged in My transcendental service, he attains Me.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: After many births and deaths, he who is actually in knowledge surrenders unto Me, knowing Me to be the cause of all causes and all that is. Such a great soul is very rare.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Those whose minds are distorted by material desires surrender unto demigods and follow the particular rules and regulations of worship according to their own natures.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: I am in everyone's heart as the Supersoul. As soon as one desires to worship the demigods, I make his faith steady so that he can devote himself to some particular deity.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Endowed with such a faith, he seeks favors of a particular demigod and obtains his desires. But in actuality these benefits are bestowed by Me alone.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Men of small intelligence worship the demigods, and their fruits are limited and temporary. Those who worship the demigods go to the planets of the demigods, but My devotees ultimately reach My supreme planet.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Unintelligent men, who know Me not, think that I have assumed this form and personality. Due to their small knowledge, they do not know My higher nature, which is changeless and supreme.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: I am never manifest to the foolish and unintelligent. For them I am covered by My eternal creative potency [yoga-maya]; and so the deluded world knows Me not, who am unborn and infallible.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: O Arjuna, as the Supreme Personality of Godhead, I know everything that has happened in the past, all that is happening in the present, and all things that are yet to come. I also know all living entities; but Me no one knows.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: O scion of Bharata [Arjuna], O conquerer of the foe, all living entities are born into delusion, overcome by the dualities of desire and hate.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Persons who have acted piously in previous lives and in this life, whose sinful actions are completely eradicated and who are freed from the duality of delusion, engage themselves in My service with determination.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Intelligent persons who are endeavoring for liberation from old age and death take refuge in Me in devotional service. They are actually Brahman because they entirely know everything about transcendental and fruitive activities.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

verses.translation: Those who know Me as the Supreme Lord, as the governing principle of the material manifestation, who know Me as the one underlying all the demigods and as the one sustaining all sacrifices, can, with steadfast mind, understand and know Me even at the time of death.
verses.topics: knowledge of the absolute god divine energy material nature spiritual nature bhakti

chapters.name: Attaining the Supreme
chapters.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Arjuna inquired: O my Lord, O Supreme Person, what is Brahman? What is the self? What are fruitive activities? What is this material manifestation? And what are the demigods? Please explain this to me.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: How does this Lord of sacrifice live in the body, and in which part does He live, O Madhusudana? And how can those engaged in devotional service know You at the time of death?
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: The Supreme Lord said, The indestructible, transcendental living entity is called Brahman, and his eternal nature is called the self. Action pertaining to the development of these material bodies is called karma, or fruitive activities.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Physical nature is known to be endlessly mutable. The universe is the cosmic form of the Supreme Lord, and I am that Lord represented as the Supersoul, dwelling in the heart of every embodied being.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: And whoever, at the time of death, quits his body, remembering Me alone, at once attains My nature. Of this there is no doubt.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Whatever state of being one remembers when he quits his body, that state he will attain without fail.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Therefore, Arjuna, you should always think of Me in the form of Krsna and at the same time carry out your prescribed duty of fighting. With your activities dedicated to Me and your mind and intelligence fixed on Me, you will attain Me without doubt.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: He who meditates on the Supreme Personality of Godhead, his mind constantly engaged in remembering Me, undeviated from the path, he, O Partha [Arjuna], is sure to reach Me.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: One should meditate upon the Supreme Person as the one who knows everything, as He who is the oldest, who is the controller, who is smaller than the smallest, who is the maintainer of everything, who is beyond all material conception, who is inconceivable, and who is always a person. He is luminous like the sun and, being transcendental, is beyond this material nature.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: One who, at the time of death, fixes his life air between the eyebrows and in full devotion engages himself in remembering the Supreme Lord, will certainly attain to the Supreme Personality of Godhead.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Persons learned in the Vedas, who utter omkara and who are great sages in the renounced order, enter into Brahman. Desiring such perfection, one practices celibacy. I shall now explain to you this process by which one may attain salvation.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: The yogic situation is that of detachment from all sensual engagements. Closing all the doors of the senses and fixing the mind on the heart and the life air at the top of the head, one establishes himself in yoga.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: After being situated in this yoga practice and vibrating the sacred syllable om, the supreme combination of letters, if one thinks of the Supreme Personality of Godhead and quits his body, he will certainly reach the spiritual planets.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: For one who remembers Me without deviation, I am easy to obtain, O son of Prtha, because of his constant engagement in devotional service.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: After attaining Me, the great souls, who are yogis in devotion, never return to this temporary world, which is full of miseries, because they have attained the highest perfection.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: From the highest planet in the material world down to the lowest, all are places of misery wherein repeated birth and death take place. But one who attains to My abode, O son of Kunti, never takes birth again.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: By human calculation, a thousand ages taken together is the duration of Brahma's one day. And such also is the duration of his night.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: When Brahma's day is manifest, this multitude of living entities comes into being, and at the arrival of Brahma's night they are all annihilated.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Again and again the day comes, and this host of beings is active; and again the night falls, O Partha, and they are helplessly dissolved.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Yet there is another nature, which is eternal and is transcendental to this manifested and unmanifested matter. It is supreme and is never annihilated. When all in this world is annihilated, that part remains as it is.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: That supreme abode is called unmanifested and infallible, and it is the supreme destination. When one goes there, he never comes back. That is My supreme abode.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: The Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is greater than all, is attainable by unalloyed devotion. Although He is present in His abode, He is all-pervading, and everything is situated within Him.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: O best of the Bharatas, I shall now explain to you the different times at which, passing away from this world, one does or does not come back.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: Those who know the Supreme Brahman pass away from the world during the influence of the fiery god, in the light, at an auspicious moment, during the fortnight of the moon and the six months when the sun travels in the north.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: The mystic who passes away from this world during the smoke, the night, the moonlight fortnight, or in the six months when the sun passes to the south, or who reaches the moon planet, again comes back.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: According to the Vedas, there are two ways of passing from this world—one in light and one in darkness. When one passes in light, he does not come back; but when one passes in darkness, he returns.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: The devotees who know these two paths, O Arjuna, are never bewildered. Therefore be always fixed in devotion.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

verses.translation: A person who accepts the path of devotional service is not bereft of the results derived from studying the Vedas, performing austere sacrifices, giving charity or pursuing philosophical and fruitive activities. At the end he reaches the supreme abode.
verses.topics: attaining the supreme brahman rebirth liberation cosmic creation imperishable

chapters.name: The Most Confidential Knowledge
chapters.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: The Supreme Lord said: My dear Arjuna, because you are never envious of Me, I shall impart to you this most secret wisdom, knowing which you shall be relieved of the miseries of material existence.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: This knowledge is the king of education, the most secret of all secrets. It is the purest knowledge, and because it gives direct perception of the self by realization, it is the perfection of religion. It is everlasting, and it is joyfully performed.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Those who are not faithful on the path of devotional service cannot attain Me, O conqueror of foes, but return to birth and death in this material world.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: By Me, in My unmanifested form, this entire universe is pervaded. All beings are in Me, but I am not in them.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: And yet everything that is created does not rest in Me. Behold My mystic opulence! Although I am the maintainer of all living entities, and although I am everywhere, still My Self is the very source of creation.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: As the mighty wind, blowing everywhere, always rests in ethereal space know that in the same manner all beings rest in Me.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: O son of Kunti, at the end of the millennium every material manifestation enters into My nature, and at the beginning of another millennium, by My potency I again create.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: The whole cosmic order is under Me. By My will it is manifested again and again, and by My will it is annihilated at the end.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: O Dhananjaya, all this work cannot bind Me. I am ever detached, seated as though neutral.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: This material nature is working under My direction, O son of Kunti, and it is producing all moving and unmoving beings. By its rule this manifestation is created and annihilated again and again.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Fools deride Me when I descend in the human form. They do not know My transcendental nature and My supreme dominion over all that be.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Those who are thus bewildered are attracted by demonic and atheistic views. In that deluded condition, their hopes for liberation, their fruitive activities, and their culture of knowledge are all defeated.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: O son of Prtha, those who are not deluded, the great souls, are under the protection of the divine nature. They are fully engaged in devotional service because they know Me as the Supreme Personality of Godhead, original and inexhaustible.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Always chanting My glories, endeavoring with great determination, bowing down before Me, these great souls perpetually worship Me with devotion.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Others, who are engaged in the cultivation of knowledge, worship the Supreme Lord as the one without a second, diverse in many, and in the universal form.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: But it is I who am the ritual, I the sacrifice, the offering to the ancestors, the healing herb, the transcendental chant. I am the butter and the fire and the offering.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: I am the father of this universe, the mother, the support, and the grandsire. I am the object of knowledge, the purifier and the syllable om. I am also the Rk, the Sama, and the Yajur [Vedas].
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: I am the goal, the sustainer, the master, the witness, the abode, the refuge and the most dear friend. I am the creation and the annihilation, the basis of everything, the resting place and the eternal seed.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: O Arjuna, I control heat, the rain and the drought. I am immortality, and I am also death personified. Both being and nonbeing are in Me.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Those who study the Vedas and drink the soma juice, seeking the heavenly planets, worship Me indirectly. They take birth on the planet of Indra, where they enjoy godly delights.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: When they have thus enjoyed heavenly sense pleasure, they return to this mortal planet again. Thus, through the Vedic principles, they achieve only flickering happiness.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: But those who worship Me with devotion, meditating on My transcendental form-to them I carry what they lack and preserve what they have.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Whatever a man may sacrifice to other gods, O son of Kunti, is really meant for Me alone, but it is offered without true understanding.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: I am the only enjoyer and the only object of sacrifice. Those who do not recognize My true transcendental nature fall down.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Those who worship the demigods will take birth among the demigods; those who worship ghosts and spirits will take birth among such beings; those who worship ancestors go to the ancestors; and those who worship Me will live with Me.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: If one offers Me with love and devotion a leaf, a flower, fruit a water, I will accept it.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: O son of Kunti, all that you do, all that you eat, all that you offer and give away, as well as all austerities that you may perform, should be done as an offering unto Me.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: In this way you will be freed from all reactions to good and evil deeds, and by this principle of renunciation you will be liberated and come to Me.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: I envy no one, nor am I partial to anyone. I am equal to all. But whoever renders service unto Me in devotion is a friend, is in Me, and I am also a friend to him.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Even if one commits the most abominable actions, if he is engaged in devotional service, he is to be considered saintly because he is properly situated.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: He quickly becomes righteous and attains lasting peace. O son of Kunti, declare it boldly that My devotee never perishes.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: O son of Prtha, those who take shelter in Me, though they be of lower birth-women, vaisyas [merchants], as well as sudras [workers]-can approach the supreme destination.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: How much greater then are the brahmanas, the righteous, the devotees and saintly kings who in this temporary miserable world engage in loving service unto Me.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

verses.translation: Engage your mind always in thinking of Me, offer obeisances and worship Me. Being completely absorbed in Me, surely you will come to Me.
verses.topics: confidential knowledge supreme god devotion bhakti all-pervading faith

chapters.name: The Opulence of the Absolute
chapters.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: The Supreme Lord said: My dear friend, mighty-armed Arjuna, listen again to My supreme word, which I shall impart to you for your benefit and which will give you great joy.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Neither the hosts of demigods nor the great sages know My origin, for, in every respect, I am the source of the demigods and the sages.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: He who knows Me as the unborn, as the beginningless, as the Supreme Lord of all the worlds-he, undeluded among men, is freed from all sins.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Intelligence, knowledge, freedom from doubt and delusion, forgiveness, truthfulness, self-control and calmness, pleasure and pain, birth, death, fear, fearlessness, nonviolence, equanimity, satisfaction, austerity, charity, fame and infamy are created by Me alone.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: The seven great sages and before them the four other great sages and the Manus [progenitors of mankind] are born out of My mind, and all creatures in these planets descend from them.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: He who knows in truth this glory and power of Mine engages in unalloyed devotional service; of this there is no doubt.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: I am the source of all spiritual and material worlds. Everything emanates from Me. The wise who know this perfectly engage in My devotional service and worship Me with all their hearts.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: The thoughts of My pure devotees dwell in Me, their lives are surrendered to Me, and they derive great satisfaction and bliss enlightening one another and conversing about Me.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: To those who are constantly devoted and worship Me with love, I give the understanding by which they can come to Me.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Out of compassion for them, I, dwelling in their hearts, destroy with the shining lamp of knowledge the darkness born of ignorance.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Arjuna said: You are the Supreme Brahman, the ultimate, the supreme abode and purifier, the Absolute Truth and the eternal divine person. You are the primal God, transcendental and original, and You are the unborn and all-pervading beauty. All the great sages such as Narada, Asita, Devala, and Vyasa proclaim this of You, and now You Yourself are declaring it to me.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: O Krsna, I totally accept as truth all that You have told me. Neither the gods nor demons, O Lord, know Thy personality.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Indeed, You alone know Yourself by Your own potencies, O origin of all, Lord of all beings, God of gods, O Supreme Person, Lord of the universe!
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Please tell me in detail of Your divine powers by which You pervade all these worlds and abide in them.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: How should I meditate on You? In what various forms are You to be contemplated, O Blessed Lord?
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Tell me again in detail, O Janardana [Krsna], of Your mighty potencies and glories, for I never tire of hearing Your ambrosial words.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: Yes, I will tell you of My splendorous manifestations, but only of those which are prominent, O Arjuna, for My opulence is limitless.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: I am the Self, O Gudakesa, seated in the hearts of all creatures. I am the beginning, the middle and the end of all beings.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of the Adityas I am Visnu, of lights I am the radiant sun, I am Marici of the Maruts, and among the stars I am the moon.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of the Vedas I am the Sama-veda; of the demigods I am Indra; of the senses I am the mind, and in living beings I am the living force [knowledge].
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of all the Rudras I am Lord Siva; of the Yaksas and Raksasas I am the lord of wealth [Kuvera]; of the Vasus I am fire [Agni], and of the mountains I am Meru.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of priests, O Arjuna, know Me to be the chief, Brhaspati, the lord of devotion. Of generals I am Skanda, the lord of war; and of bodies of water I am the ocean.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of the great sages I am Bhrgu; of vibrations I am the transcendental om. Of sacrifices I am the chanting of the holy names [japa], and of immovable things I am the Himalayas.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of all trees I am the holy fig tree, and amongst sages and demigods I am Narada. Of the singers of the gods [Gandharvas] I am Citraratha, and among perfected beings I am the sage Kapila.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of horses know Me to be Uccaihsrava, who rose out of the ocean, born of the elixir of immortality; of lordly elephants I am Airavata, and among men I am the monarch.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of weapons I am the thunderbolt; among cows I am the surabhi, givers of abundant milk. Of procreators I am Kandarpa, the god of love, and of serpents I am Vasuki, the chief.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of the celestial Naga snakes I am Ananta; of the aquatic deities I am Varuna. Of departed ancestors I am Aryama, and among the dispensers of law I am Yama, lord of death.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Among the Daitya demons I am the devoted Prahlada; among subduers I am time; among the beasts I am the lion, and among birds I am Garuda, the feathered carrier of Visnu.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of purifiers I am the wind; of the wielders of weapons I am Rama; of fishes I am the shark, and of flowing rivers I am the Ganges.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of all creations I am the beginning and the end and also the middle, O Arjuna. Of all sciences I am the spiritual science of the Self, and among logicians I am the conclusive truth.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of letters I am the letter A, and among compounds I am the dual word. I am also inexhaustable time, and of creators I am Brahma, whose manifold faces turn everywhere.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: I am all-devouring death, and I am the generator of all things yet to be. Among women I am fame, fortune, speech, memory, intelligence, faithfulness and patience.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of hymns I am the Brhat-sama sung to the Lord Indra, and of poetry I am the Gayatri verse, sung daily by brahmanas. Of months I am November and December, and of seasons I am flower-bearing spring.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: I am also the gambling of cheats, and of the splendid I am the splendor. I am victory, I am adventure, and I am the strength of the strong.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Of the descendants of Vrsni I am Vasudeva, and of the Pandavas I am Arjuna. Of the sages I am Vyasa, and among great thinkers I am Usana.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Among punishments I am the rod of chastisement, and of those who seek victory, I am morality. Of secret things I am silence, and of the wise I am wisdom.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Furthermore, O Arjuna, I am the generating seed of all existences. There is no being-moving or unmoving-that can exist without Me.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: O mighty conqueror of enemies, there is no end to My divine manifestations. What I have spoken to you is but a mere indication of My infinite opulences.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: Know that all beautiful, glorious, and mighty creations spring from but a spark of My splendor.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

verses.translation: But what need is there, Arjuna, for all this detailed knowledge? With a single fragment of Myself I pervade and support this entire universe.
verses.topics: opulence of the absolute divine manifestations glories of god arjuna praise

chapters.name: The Universal Form
chapters.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Arjuna said: I have heard Your instruction on confidential spiritual matters which You have so kindly delivered unto me, and my illusion is now dispelled.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O lotus-eyed one, I have heard from You in detail about the appearance and disappearance of every living entity, as realized through Your inexhaustible glories.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O greatest of all personalities, O supreme form, though I see here before me Your actual position, I yet wish to see how You have entered into this cosmic manifestation. I want to see that form of Yours.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: If You think that I am able to behold Your cosmic form, O my Lord, O master of all mystic power, then kindly show me that universal self.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: My dear Arjuna, O son of Prtha, behold now My opulences, hundreds of thousands of varied divine forms, multicolored like the sea.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O best of the Bharatas, see here the different manifestations of Adityas, Rudras, and all the demigods. Behold the many things which no one has ever seen or heard before.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Whatever you wish to see can be seen all at once in this body. This universal form can show you all that you now desire, as well as whatever you may desire in the future. Everything is here completely.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: But you cannot see Me with your present eyes. Therefore I give to you divine eyes by which you can behold My mystic opulence.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Sanjaya said: O King, speaking thus, the Supreme, the Lord of all mystic power, the Personality of Godhead, displayed His universal form to Arjuna.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Arjuna saw in that universal form unlimited mouths and unlimited eyes. It was all wondrous. The form was decorated with divine, dazzling ornaments and arrayed in many garbs. He was garlanded gloriously, and there were many scents smeared over His body. All was magnificent, all-expanding, unlimited. This was seen by Arjuna.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: If hundreds of thousands of suns rose up at once into the sky, they might resemble the effulgence of the Supreme Person in that universal form.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: At that time Arjuna could see in the universal form of the Lord the unlimited expansions of the universe situated in one place although divided into many, many thousands.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Then, bewildered and astonished, his hair standing on end, Arjuna began to pray with folded hands, offering obeisances to the Supreme Lord.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Arjuna said: My dear Lord Krsna, I see assembled together in Your body all the demigods and various other living entities. I see Brahma sitting on the lotus flower as well as Lord Siva and many sages and divine serpents.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O Lord of the universe, I see in Your universal body many, many forms-bellies, mouths, eyes-expanded without limit. There is no end, there is no beginning, and there is no middle to all this.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Your form, adorned with various crowns, clubs and discs, is difficult to see because of its glaring effulgence, which is fiery and immeasurable like the sun.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: You are the supreme primal objective; You are the best in all the universes; You are inexhaustible, and You are the oldest; You are the maintainer of religion, the eternal Personality of Godhead.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: You are the origin without beginning, middle or end. You have numberless arms, and the sun and moon are among Your great unlimited eyes. By Your own radiance You are heating this entire universe.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Although You are one, You are spread throughout the sky and the planets and all space between. O great one, as I behold this terrible form, I see that all the planetary systems are perplexed.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: All the demigods are surrendering and entering into You. They are very much afraid, and with folded hands they are singing the Vedic hymns.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: The different manifestations of Lord Siva, the Adityas, the Vasus, the Sadhyas, the Visvadevas, the two Asvins, the Maruts, the forefathers and the Gandharvas, the Yaksas, Asuras, and all perfected demigods are beholding You in wonder.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O mighty-armed one, all the planets with their demigods are disturbed at seeing Your many faces, eyes, arms, bellies and legs and Your terrible teeth, and as they are disturbed, so am I.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O all-pervading Visnu, I can no longer maintain my equilibrium. Seeing Your radiant colors fill the skies and beholding Your eyes and mouths, I am afraid.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O Lord of lords, O refuge of the worlds, please be gracious to me. I cannot keep my balance seeing thus Your blazing deathlike faces and awful teeth. In all directions I am bewildered.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: All the sons of Dhrtarastra along with their allied kings, and Bhisma, Drona and Karna, and all our soldiers are rushing into Your mouths, their heads smashed by Your fearful teeth. I see that some are being crushed between Your teeth as well.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: As the rivers flow into the sea, so all these great warriors enter Your blazing mouths and perish.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: I see all people rushing with full speed into Your mouths as moths dash into a blazing fire.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O Visnu, I see You devouring all people in Your flaming mouths and covering the universe with Your immeasurable rays. Scorching the worlds, You are manifest.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O Lord of lords, so fierce of form, please tell me who You are. I offer my obeisances unto You; please be gracious to me. I do not know what Your mission is, and I desire to hear of it.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: Time I am, destroyer of the worlds, and I have come to engage all people. With the exception of you [the Pandavas], all the soldiers here on both sides will be slain.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Therefore get up and prepare to fight. After conquering your enemies you will enjoy a flourishing kingdom. They are already put to death by My arrangement, and you, O Savyasacin, can be but an instmment in the fight.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: All the great warriors-Drona, Bhisma, Jayadratha, Karna-are already destroyed. Simply fight, and you will vanquish your enemies.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Sanjaya said to Dhrtarastra: O King, after hearing these words from the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Arjuna trembled, fearfully offered obeisances with folded hands and began, falteringly, to speak as follows:
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O Hrsikesa, the world becomes joyful upon hearing Your name and thus everyone becomes attached to You. Although the perfected beings offer You their respectful homage, the demons are afraid, and they flee here and there. All this is rightly done.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O great one, who stands above even Brahma, You are the original master. Why should they not offer their homage up to You, O limitless one? O refuge of the universe, You are the invincible source, the cause of all causes, transcendental to this material manifestation.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: You are the original Personality, the Godhead. You are the only sanctuary of this manifested cosmic world. You know everything, and You are all that is knowable. You are above the material modes. O limitless form! This whole cosmic manifestation is pervaded by You!
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: You are air, fire, water, and You are the moon! You are the supreme controller and the grandfather. Thus I offer my respectful obeisances unto You a thousand times, and again and yet again!
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Obeisances from the front, from behind and from all sides! O unbounded power, You are the master of limitless, might! You are all-pervading, and thus You are everything!
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: I have in the past addressed You as O Krsna, O Yadava, O my friend, without knowing Your glories. Please forgive whatever I may have done in madness or in love. I have dishonored You many times while relaxing or while lying on the same bed or eating together, sometimes alone and sometimes in front of many friends. Please excuse me for all my offenses.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: You are the father of this complete cosmic manifestation, the worshipable chief, the spiritual master. No one is equal to You, nor can anyone be one with You. Within the three worlds, You are immeasurable.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: You are the Supreme Lord, to be worshiped by every living being. Thus I fall down to offer You my respects and ask Your mercy. Please tolerate the wrongs that I may have done to You and bear with me as a father with his son, or a friend with his friend, or a lover with his beloved.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: After seeing this universal form, which I have never seen before, I am gladdened, but at the same time my mind is disturbed with fear. Therefore please bestow Your grace upon me and reveal again Your form as the Personality of Godhead, O Lord of lords, O abode of the universe.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O universal Lord, I wish to see You in Your four-armed form, with helmeted head and with club, wheel, conch and lotus flower in Your hands. I long to see You in that form.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: My dear Arjuna, happily do I show you this universal form within the material world by My internal potency. No one before you has ever seen this unlimited and glaringly effulgent form.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: O best of the Kuru warriors, no one before you has ever seen this universal form of Mine, for neither by studying the Vedas, nor by performing sacrifices, nor by charities or similar activities can this form be seen. Only you have seen this.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Your mind has been perturbed upon seeing this horrible feature of Mine. Now let it be finished. My devotee, be free from all disturbance. With a peaceful mind you can now see the form you desire.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: Sanjaya said to Dhrtarastra: The Supreme Personality of Godhead, Krsna, while speaking thus to Arjuna, displayed His real four-armed form, and at last He showed him His two-armed form, thus encouraging the fearful Arjuna.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: When Arjuna thus saw Krsna in His original form, he said: Seeing this humanlike form, so very beautiful, my mind is now pacified, and I am restored to my original nature.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: My dear Arjuna, the form which you are now seeing is very difficult to behold. Even the demigods are ever seeking the opportunity to see this form which is so dear.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: The form which you are seeing with your transcendental eyes cannot be understood simply by studying the Vedas, nor by undergoing serious penances, nor by charity, nor by worship. It is not by these means that one can see Me as I am.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: My dear Arjuna, only by undivided devotional service can I be understood as I am, standing before you, and can thus be seen directly. Only in this way can you enter into the mysteries of My understanding.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

verses.translation: My dear Arjuna, one who is engaged in My pure devotional service, free from the contaminations of previous activities and from mental speculation, who is friendly to every living entity, certainly comes to Me.
verses.topics: universal form visvarupa cosmic vision arjuna sees krishna universal form

chapters.name: Devotional Service
chapters.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: Arjuna inquired: Which is considered to be more perfect: those who are properly engaged in Your devotional service, or those who worship the impersonal Brahman, the unmanifested?
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: He whose mind is fixed on My personal form, always engaged in worshiping Me with great and transcendental faith, is considered by Me to be most perfect.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: But those who fully worship the unmanifested, that which lies beyond the perception of the senses, the all-pervading, inconceivable, fixed, and immovable-the impersonal conception of the Absolute Truth-by controlling the various senses and being equally disposed to everyone, such persons, engaged in the welfare of all, at last achieve Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: For those whose minds are attached to the unmanifested, impersonal feature of the Supreme, advancement is very troublesome. To make progrese in that discipline is always difficult for those who are embodied.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: For one who worships Me, giving up all his activities unto Me and being devoted to Me without deviation, engaged in devotional service and always meditating upon Me, who has fixed his mind upon Me, O son of Prtha, for him I am the swift deliverer from the ocean of birth and death.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: Just fix your mind upon Me, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, and engage all your intelligence in Me. Thus you will live in Me always, without a doubt.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: My dear Arjuna, O winner of wealth, if you cannot fix your mind upon Me without deviation, then follow the regulated principles of bhakti-yoga In this way you will develop a desire to attain to Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: If you cannot practice the regulations of bhakti-yoga, then just try to work for Me, because by working for Me you will come to the perfect stage.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: If, however, you are unable to work in this consciousness, then try to act giving up all results of your work and try to be self-situated.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: If you cannot take to this practice, then engage yourself in the cultivation of knowledge. Better than knowledge, however, is meditation, and better than meditation is renunciation of the fruits of action, for by such renunciation one can attain peace of mind.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: One who is not envious but who is a kind friend to all living entities, who does not think himself a proprietor, who is free from false ego and equal both in happiness and distress, who is always satisfied and engaged in devotional service with determination and whose mind and intelligence are in agreement with Me-he is very dear to Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: He for whom no one is put into difficulty and who is not dirturbed by anxiety, who is steady in happiness and distress, is very dear to Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: A devotee who is not dependant on the ordinary course of activities, who is pure, expert, without cares, free from all pains, and who does not strive for some result, is very dear to Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: One who neither grasps pleasure or grief, who neither laments nor desires, and who renounces both auspicious and inauspicious things, is very dear to Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: One who is equal to friends and enemies, who is equiposed in honor and dishonor, heat and cold, happiness and distress, fame and infamy, who is always free from contamination, always silent and satisfied with anything, who doesn't care for any residence, who is fixed in knowledge and engaged in devotional service, is very dear to Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

verses.translation: He who follows this imperishable path of devotional service and who completely engages himself with faith, making Me the supreme goal, is very, very dear to Me.
verses.topics: devotional service bhakti-yoga devotion worship qualities of devotee

chapters.name: Nature, the Enjoyer, and Consciousness
chapters.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Arjuna said: O my dear Krsna, I wish to know about prakrti [nature], Purusa [the enjoyer], and the field and the knower of the field, and of knowledge and the end of knowledge. The Blessed Lord then said: This body, O son of Kunti, is called the field, and one who knows this body is called the knower of the field.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: O scion of Bharata, you should understand that I am also the knower in all bodies, and to understand this body and its owner is called knowledge. That is My opinion.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Now please hear My brief description of this field of activity and how it is constituted, what its changes are, whence it is produced, who that knower of the field of activities is, and what his influences are.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: That knowledge of the field of activities and of the knower of activities is described by various sages in various Vedic writings-especially in the Vedanta-sutra-and is presented with all reasoning as to cause and effect.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: The five great elements, false ego, intelligence, the unmanifested, the ten senses, the mind, the five sense objects, desire, hatred, happiness, distress, the aggregate, the life symptoms, and convictions-all these are considered, in summary, to be the field of activities and its interactions.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Humility, pridelessness, nonviolence, tolerance, simplicity, approaching a bona fide spiritual master, cleanliness, steadiness and self-control; renunciation of the objects of sense gratification, absence of false ego, the perception of the evil of birth, death, old age and disease; nonattachment to children, wife, home and the rest, and evenmindedness amid pleasant and unpleasant events; constant and unalloyed devotion to Me, resorting to solitary places, detachment from the general mass of people; accepting the importance of self-realization, and philosophical search for the Absolute Truth-all these I thus declare to be knowledge, and what is contrary to these is ignorance.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: I shall now explain the knowable, knowing which you will taste the eternal. This is beginningless, and it is subordinate to Me. It is called Brahman, the spirit, and it lies beyond the cause and effect of this material world.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Everywhere are His hands and legs, His eyes and faces, and He hears everything. In this way the Supersoul exists.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: The Supersoul is the original source of all senses, yet He is without senses. He is unattached, although He is the maintainer of all living beings. He transcends the modes of nature, and at the same time He is the master of all modes of material nature.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: The Supreme Truth exists both internally and externally, in the moving and nonmoving. He is beyond the power of the material senses to see or to know. Although far, far away, He is also near to all.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Although the Supersoul appears to be divided, He is never divided. He is situated as one. Although He is the maintainer of every living entity, it is to be understood that He devours and develops all.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: He is the source of light in all luminous objects. He is beyond the darkness of matter and is unmanifested. He is knowledge, He is the object of knowledge, and He is the goal of knowledge. He is situated in everyone's heart.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Thus the field of activities [the body], knowledge, and the knowable have been summarily described by Me. Only My devotees can understand this thoroughly and thus attain to My nature.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Material nature and the living entities should be understood to be beginningless. Their transformations and the modes of matter are products of material nature.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Nature is said to be the cause of all material activities and effects, whereas the living entity is the cause of the various sufferings and enjoyments in this world.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: The living entity in material nature thus follows the ways of life, enjoying the three modes of nature. This is due to his association with that material nature. Thus he meets with good and evil amongst various species.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Yet in this body there is another, a transcendental enjoyer who is the Lord, the supreme proprietor, who exists as the overseer and permitter, and who is known as the Supersoul.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: One who understands this philosophy concerning material nature, the living entity and the interaction of the modes of nature is sure to attain liberation. He will not take birth here again, regardless of his present position.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: That Supersoul is perceived by some through meditation, by some through the cultivation of knowledge, and by others through working without fruitive desire.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Again there are those who, although not conversant in spiritual knowledge, begin to worship the Supreme Person upon hearing about Him from others. Because of their tendency to hear from authorities, they also transcend the path of birth and death.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: O chief of the Bharatas, whatever you see in existence, both moving and unmoving, is only the combination of the field of activities and the knower of the field.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: One who sees the Supersoul accompanying the individual soul in all bodies and who understands that neither the soul nor the Supersoul is ever destroyed, actually sees.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: One who sees the Supersoul in every living being and equal everywhere does not degrade himself by his mind. Thus he approaches the transcendental destination.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: One who can see that all activities are performed by the body, which is created of material nature, and sees that the self does nothing, actually sees.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: When a sensible man ceases to see different identities, which are due to different material bodies, he attains to the Brahman conception. Thus he sees that beings are expanded everywhere.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: Those with the vision of eternity can see that the soul is transcendental, eternal, and beyond the modes of nature. Despite contact with the material body, O Arjuna, the soul neither does anything nor is entangled.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: The sky, due to its subtle nature, does not mix with anything, although it is all-pervading. Similarly, the soul, situated in Brahman vision, does not mix with the body, though situated in that body.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: O son of Bharata, as the sun alone illuminates all this universe, so does the living entity, one within the body, illuminate the entire body by consciousness.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

verses.translation: One who knowingly sees this difference between the body and the owner of the body and can understand the process of liberation from this bondage, also attains to the supreme goal.
verses.topics: nature purusha prakriti consciousness field of activities knower of the field knowledge

chapters.name: The Three Modes Of Material Nature
chapters.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: Again I shall declare to you this supreme wisdom, the best of all knowledge, knowing which all the sages have attained to supreme perfection.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: By becoming fixed in this knowledge, one can attain to the transcendental nature, which is like My own nature. Thus established, one is not born at the time of creation nor disturbed at the time of dissolution.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: The total material substance, called Brahman, is the source of birth, and it is that Brahman that I impregnate, making possible the births of all living beings, O son of Bharata.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: It should be understood that all species of life, O son of Kunti, are made possible by birth in this material nature, and that I am the seed-giving father.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: Material nature consists of the three modes-goodness, passion and ignorance. When the living entity comes in contact with nature, he becomes conditioned by these modes.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: O sinless one, the mode of goodness, being purer than the others, is illuminating, and it frees one from all sinful reactions. Those situated in that mode develop knowledge, but they become conditioned by the concept of happiness.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: The mode of passion is born of unlimited desires and longings, O son of Kunti, and because of this one is bound to material fruitive activities.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: O son of Bharata, the mode of ignorance causes the delusion of all living entities. The result of this mode is madness, indolence and sleep, which bind the conditioned soul.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: The mode of goodness conditions one to happiness, passion conditions him to the fruits of action, and ignorance to madness.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: Sometimes the mode of passion becomes prominent, defeating the mode of goodness, O son of Bharata. And sometimes the mode of goodness defeats passion, and at other times the mode of ignorance defeats goodness and passion. In this way there is always competition for supremacy.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: The manifestations of the mode of goodness can be experienced when all the gates of the body are illuminated by knowledge.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: O chief of the Bharatas, when there is an increase in the mode of passion, the symptoms of great attachment, uncontrollable desire, hankering, and intense endeavor develop.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: O son of Kuru, when there is an increase in the mode of ignorance madness, illusion, inertia and darkness are manifested.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: When one dies in the mode of goodness, he attains to the pure higher planets.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: When one dies in the mode of passion, he takes birth among those engaged in fruitive activities; and when he dies in the mode of ignorance, he takes birth in the animal kingdom.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: By acting in the mode of goodness, one becomes purified. Works done in the mode of passion result in distress, and actions performed in the mode of ignorance result in foolishness.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: From the mode of goodness, real knowledge develops; from the mode of passion, grief develops; and from the mode of ignorance, foolishness, madness and illusion develop.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: Those situated in the mode of goodness gradually go upward to the higher planets; those in the mode of passion live on the earthly planets; and those in the mode of ignorance go down to the hellish worlds.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: When you see that there is nothing beyond these modes of nature in all activities and that the Supreme Lord is transcendental to all these modes, then you can know My spiritual nature.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: When the embodied being is able to transcend these three modes, he can become free from birth, death, old age and their distresses and can enjoy nectar even in this life.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: Arjuna inquired: O my dear Lord, by what symptoms is one known who is transcendental to those modes? What is his behavior? And how does he transcend the modes of nature?
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: He who does not hate illumination, attachment and delusion when they are present, nor longs for them when they disappear; who is seated like one unconcerned, being situated beyond these material reactions of the modes of nature, who remains firm, knowing that the modes alone are active; who regards alike pleasure and pain, and looks on a clod, a stone and a piece of gold with an equal eye; who is wise and holds praise and blame to be the same; who is unchanged in honor and dishonor, who treats friend and foe alike, who has abandoned all fruitive undertakings-such a man is said to have transcended the modes of nature.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence

verses.translation: One who engages in full devotional service, who does not fall down in any circumstance, at once transcends the modes of material nature and thus comes to the level of Brahman.
verses.topics: three modes of nature sattva rajas tamas gunas transcendence
